attacking_style: Demonstrates aggressive breakaway tactics with premature attacks launched well before final climbs, often fragmenting large groups through excessive early pace-making rather than timed final strikes.
team_tactics: UAE positioning appears inconsistent - places riders prominently in final kilometers but fails to execute coordinated leadout work, with riders refusing to pull through at critical moments.
terrain_preference: Shows willingness to attack on approaches to climbs rather than on the climbs themselves; prefers to use sustained high tempo over explosive accelerations to create selection.
vulnerability: Exposed when required to contribute consistently to leadout trains or breakaway rotation; excessive early aggression leaves questions about ability to finish efforts initiated far from line.
key_patterns: Attacks breakaways prematurely, fragmenting groups through unsustainable early aggression before key terrain.
Positioned in favorable wheels for finales but refuses to pull through in rotation.
UAE team positioning inconsistent with execution - domestiques placed well but coordination breaks down.
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data - only 2021 observations available showing tactical aggression but execution issues
